violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment * was not cleaned properly. = Cabinet faces and door handles require cleaning.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface * was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. - Door handle broken and repaired with duct tape.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors and walls require cleaning around trash cans.
